purpose: Trigger-quality evaluation prompts for the connect-openclaw-toolkit Agent Skill.
usage: Use these prompts to test whether the skill triggers on genuine OpenClaw toolkit-linking and verification requests while avoiding false positives on Cursor-only setup, generic symlink debugging, or requests to edit the toolkit's own scripts.

cases.query: Link my shared toolkit repo into OpenClaw and show me the source and target paths before you do anything.
cases.why: Direct request to connect a toolkit repo into OpenClaw with path review first.

cases.query: Can you re-run connect-openclaw for this toolkit and verify that my OpenClaw skills and scripts symlinks are correct afterward?
cases.why: Explicit connect-plus-verify workflow for the OpenClaw links managed by this skill.

cases.query: I think my .openclaw/skills or .openclaw/scripts link broke after moving my toolkit clone. Please inspect the OpenClaw toolkit wiring and tell me what to relink.
cases.why: Broken-link diagnosis within the specific OpenClaw toolkit-linking workflow, including either managed OpenClaw symlink.

cases.query: Which script should I use on Windows with pwsh to connect this toolkit into OpenClaw, and what exact paths will it link?
cases.why: Platform-specific script selection plus path confirmation for the OpenClaw toolkit workflow.

cases.query: I used a custom OPENCLAW_SCRIPTS_DIR. Please verify whether the toolkit's scripts directory is linked into the right OpenClaw location.
cases.why: Explicit request involving the OpenClaw scripts symlink override handled by this skill.

cases.query: Before changing anything, resolve the toolkit root, OpenClaw home, and OpenClaw scripts dir you would use for connect-openclaw.
cases.why: Direct request for the pre-approval path-resolution stage defined by this skill.

cases.query: Set up this toolkit's Cursor rules in my project.
cases.why: Cursor-only setup is explicitly out of scope for this skill.

cases.query: My home directory has a broken symlink somewhere. Can you help me debug it?
cases.why: Generic symlink troubleshooting is broader than this toolkit-specific OpenClaw workflow.

cases.query: Edit connect-openclaw.sh so it supports another command-line flag.
cases.why: Editing the toolkit repo's setup scripts is explicitly out of scope.

cases.query: Show me all skills currently available in OpenClaw.
cases.why: Listing skills is unrelated to connecting a toolkit repo into OpenClaw.

cases.query: Create a new Agent Skill for wiring shared repos into different tools.
cases.why: This is skill creation work, which should trigger the skill-creator skill instead.

cases.query: Verify only my project's .cursor/rules link and ignore OpenClaw.
cases.why: Project-level Cursor verification alone is outside this skill's OpenClaw-specific scope.
